transcript:
Meeting Transcript – Cross-Functional Planning Session

Attendees:
Emma (Project Manager), Liam (Engineering Lead), Sofia (Marketing Director), Noah (Design Lead), Ava (QA Lead), Ethan (Finance), Mia (HR), Lucas (Operations)

Emma: Thanks everyone for joining. We have several action items to assign across teams for the upcoming product launch. Let’s move quickly.

Emma: Liam, engineering needs to finalize the API integration. Can you have that completed by May 1st?

Liam: Yes, I’ll take ownership of that and ensure the API integration is complete by May 1st.

Emma: Great. Ava, once that’s done, QA needs to begin full regression testing immediately after.

Ava: Understood. I’ll start regression testing as soon as integration is complete and aim to finish by May 5th.

Emma: Sofia, marketing needs to prepare the launch campaign materials.

Sofia: I’ll have the campaign assets ready by April 28th. I’ll also coordinate with Noah on design requirements.

Emma: Noah, can you support Sofia with final visual assets?

Noah: Yes, I’ll deliver all required design assets by April 25th.

Emma: Ethan, we need a finalized budget report for leadership review.

Ethan: I’ll prepare and submit the budget report by April 27th.

Emma: Lucas, operations needs to ensure distribution channels are ready.

Lucas: I’ll confirm all distribution logistics and report back by May 3rd.

Emma: Mia, please organize a training session for customer support staff.

Mia: I’ll schedule and conduct the training session before the launch, no later than May 4th.

Emma: Additionally, I will compile a final status report for executives by May 6th.

Liam: We also need someone to monitor system performance post-launch.

Emma: Good point. Ava, can QA handle monitoring during the first week after launch?

Ava: Yes, I’ll oversee system monitoring for the first week post-launch.

Sofia: I’ll also track campaign performance metrics and share a report, no strict deadline but within the first week after launch.

Emma: Perfect. Any other items?

Noah: We should update documentation.

Emma: Agreed. Liam, can engineering update the technical documentation?

Liam: Yes, I’ll update the documentation, no specific deadline but before the end of the launch week.

Emma: That covers everything. Thanks everyone.

Meeting Adjourned.
